components.name: AppShell
components.layout: Full viewport wrapper. Warm linen background (#F8F6F3). Contains Sidebar on desktop (240px fixed left), TopBar on mobile. Main content area with max-w-[1120px] centered, px-6 on desktop, px-4 on mobile.
components.notes: Background uses a subtle CSS radial gradient overlay (warm cream to slightly cooler cream) to avoid flat single-color feel. No noise texture on scrolling content.

components.name: Sidebar
components.layout: Fixed left column, 240px wide, full height. Glass surface (backdrop-blur-xl, surface color). Logo at top, nav links stacked vertically with 8px gap, user avatar and email at bottom.
components.notes: Glass panel with 1px right border (border token). Nav items have 12px radius hover state with surface_hover background. Active item uses accent_light background with accent text. Hidden below 1024px, replaced by TopBar hamburger menu. Spring transition on active indicator (stiffness: 200, damping: 25).

components.name: TopBar
components.layout: Mobile-only sticky top bar. Full width, 56px height. Glass surface with backdrop-blur-lg. Hamburger left, page title center, action buttons right.
components.notes: Only visible below 1024px. Uses glass token shadow. Hamburger opens a full-screen overlay nav with staggered fade-in (100ms delay per item).

components.name: PageHeader
components.layout: Left-aligned title (text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight) with optional subtitle below (muted color, text-sm). Action button (like 'New Proposal') aligned right on desktop, full-width below on mobile.
components.notes: Title uses foreground color. No centered text. Margin-bottom 32px to content.

components.name: GlassCard
components.layout: Container with glass surface background, border token, card radius (20px), card shadow. Default padding 24px.
components.notes: Glass morphism: backdrop-blur-xl, semi-transparent white bg, 1px border with border-white/10 inner highlight, inset shadow for edge refraction. When hoverable=true, scale-[1.01] on hover with elevated shadow, spring transition (300ms, cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1)). Never use for pure spacing -- only when elevation communicates hierarchy.

components.name: FormField
components.layout: Label above input (text-sm font-medium, 4px margin-bottom). Input full width, 44px height, 12px radius, 12px horizontal padding. Error text below in error color, helper text in muted.
components.notes: Input background: white with 60% opacity (glass feel). Border: border token, transitions to accent on focus with a soft ring (ring-2 ring-accent/20). Labels never float -- always static above. Gap-2 between label-input-error stack.

components.name: Button
components.layout: Variants: primary (accent bg, white text), secondary (surface bg, foreground text), ghost (transparent, foreground text). Sizes: sm (32px h, text-sm), md (40px h, text-sm), lg (48px h, text-base). Icon optional left or right.
components.notes: Button radius 12px. Primary has subtle shadow (0 1px 2px accent/20). Active state: scale-[0.98] translateY(1px) for tactile press feel. Loading state: content fades to 0 opacity, spinner appears in center. No large internal padding for spacing -- use margin on the button or siblings. Spring transition on press.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.layout: Inline pill shape with badge radius (8px). Padding px-2.5 py-1. Text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wide.
components.notes: Status colors: draft = muted bg + muted text, sent = accent_light bg + accent text, accepted = success/10 bg + success text, rejected = error/10 bg + error text. No outer glow or neon effects.

components.name: ProposalCard
components.layout: GlassCard with hoverable=true. Top row: client_name (font-semibold) + StatusBadge right-aligned. Second row: segment and service as muted text. Bottom row: estimated_value formatted as currency left, deadline date right. Follow-up indicator: small amber dot + 'Follow-up pending' text if applicable.
components.notes: Follow-up indicator uses warning color. Entire card is clickable. On hover, slight upward lift with spring animation. Stagger children on list mount (80ms delay per card).

components.name: ProposalForm
components.layout: Vertical stack of FormField components inside a GlassCard. Fields: client_name (text), segment (text), service (textarea, 3 rows), estimated_value (number with currency prefix), deadline (date picker). Submit button full-width at bottom, lg size, primary variant.
components.notes: Two-column grid on desktop for client_name + segment row, and estimated_value + deadline row. Service field spans full width. 24px gap between field groups. Form validation shows inline errors below each field.

components.name: SectionEditor
components.layout: GlassCard per section. Section title (text-lg font-semibold) with edit icon button right-aligned. Content area: read-mode shows formatted text, edit-mode shows textarea (min 120px height, auto-grow). Save/Cancel buttons appear in edit mode at bottom-right.
components.notes: Transition between read and edit mode uses layout animation (height interpolation with spring physics). Textarea has same glass input styling as FormField. Section order: introduction, scope, investment, next_steps. Each section has a subtle left accent border (3px, accent color) in read mode.

components.name: GenerateButton
components.layout: Large primary button with sparkle/wand icon. When loading, button text changes to 'Generating...' with a shimmer animation across the surface.
components.notes: Shimmer uses a moving linear-gradient (accent_light to transparent) translating across the button surface during loading. Uses CSS animation, not JS-driven re-renders. When hasContent=true, button text changes to 'Regenerate' with a refresh icon.

components.name: ExportPDFButton
components.layout: Secondary button variant with download icon. Fixed position in the proposal detail page header actions area.
components.notes: On click, brief scale-down press animation then a success checkmark replaces the icon for 2 seconds. Uses spring transition.

components.name: RoutineLogRow
components.layout: Table-like row inside a GlassCard list. Columns: routine_name, triggered_by (badge: cron=muted, manual=accent), status (badge: completed=success, failed=error, running=warning), proposals_affected count, started_at formatted date, duration (finished_at - started_at).
components.notes: Rows use divide-y border pattern instead of individual cards to reduce visual noise (high-density data). Running status has a subtle pulse animation on the badge. Hover highlights row with surface_hover.

components.name: TriggerButton
components.layout: Primary button with play/bolt icon. When confirmRequired=true, first click transforms the button into a confirmation state: text changes to 'Confirm trigger?', color shifts to warning, second click executes.
components.notes: Confirmation state auto-reverts after 3 seconds if not clicked. Transition between states uses spring layout animation. After trigger, shows success toast.

components.name: Toast
components.layout: Fixed bottom-right (desktop) or bottom-center (mobile). GlassCard with tighter padding (12px 16px). Icon left (success/error/info), message text, close X right.
components.notes: Enters from bottom with spring animation (translateY 100% to 0, opacity 0 to 1). Auto-dismisses after 4 seconds with fade-out. Stacks vertically if multiple toasts.

components.name: EmptyState
components.layout: Centered vertically in content area. Subtle illustration or icon (muted, 48px). Title below (text-lg font-medium), description (text-sm muted, max-w-[40ch]). Optional action button below.
components.notes: No emoji illustrations. Use simple line icons from Phosphor (Light weight). Gentle fade-in on mount. Description text uses muted color.

components.name: SkeletonLoader
components.layout: Variants: card (matches ProposalCard dimensions), form (matches ProposalForm layout), detail (matches SectionEditor layout), table (matches RoutineLogRow pattern). Uses rounded shapes matching component radii.
components.notes: Shimmer animation: moving highlight gradient (surface to surface_hover to surface) translating left-to-right over 1.5s infinite loop. Must match exact layout dimensions of the component it replaces.

components.name: AuthLayout
components.layout: Full viewport, two-column split on desktop: left 55% has brand panel (accent gradient background, product name, tagline, subtle geometric pattern), right 45% has centered auth form. Mobile: full-width form only, brand panel hidden.
components.notes: Brand panel gradient: from accent (#2563EB) to a slightly darker shade (#1D4ED8), angled 135deg. Geometric pattern uses thin white/10 lines forming a subtle grid. Auth form container is a GlassCard with max-w-[400px].

components.name: FilterBar
components.layout: Horizontal row of pill-shaped toggle buttons. Active filter has accent_light background with accent text. Inactive filters have transparent bg with muted text.
components.notes: Uses badge radius (8px). Active indicator animates between pills using layoutId for shared element transition. Scrollable horizontally on mobile with no visible scrollbar.

components.name: ConfirmDialog
components.layout: Centered modal overlay. Backdrop: black/40 with backdrop-blur-sm. Dialog: GlassCard, max-w-[420px], with title, message, and two buttons (cancel secondary, confirm primary or error variant).
components.notes: Backdrop fades in (opacity 0 to 1, 200ms). Dialog scales from 0.95 to 1 with spring animation. Escape key and backdrop click close the dialog.

/login.layout: AuthLayout. Right panel contains: Logo + app name at top, 'Sign in to your account' heading, email FormField, password FormField, primary Button 'Sign in' full-width, divider, 'No account? Sign up' link below. Max-w-[400px] centered form.

/register.layout: AuthLayout. Right panel contains: Logo + app name at top, 'Create your account' heading, email FormField, password FormField, confirm password FormField, primary Button 'Create account' full-width, divider, 'Already have an account? Sign in' link below. Max-w-[400px] centered form.

/proposals.layout: AppShell > PageHeader (title: 'Proposals', action: Button 'New Proposal' linking to /proposals/new) > FilterBar (all, draft, sent, accepted, rejected) > grid of ProposalCards (2 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile, gap-16px). If no proposals, show EmptyState. SkeletonLoader while fetching.

/proposals/new.layout: AppShell > PageHeader (title: 'New Proposal', subtitle: 'Fill in the client details to generate a proposal') > ProposalForm centered with max-w-[640px].

/proposals/:id.layout: AppShell > PageHeader (title: client_name, subtitle: segment + service, action: row of ExportPDFButton + StatusBadge) > If no content: GenerateButton centered in a large empty area with EmptyState messaging. If content exists: vertical stack of 4 SectionEditor cards (introduction, scope, investment, next_steps) with 16px gap. GenerateButton at top-right to regenerate. Save all button at bottom.

/routines.layout: AppShell > PageHeader (title: 'Follow-up Routines', subtitle: 'Automated follow-up routine runs daily at 09:00', action: TriggerButton) > GlassCard containing RoutineLogRow list with divide-y separator. If no logs, EmptyState. SkeletonLoader while fetching. Responsive: on mobile, rows become stacked cards with key-value pairs instead of table columns.

animations.page_transition: Fade-in with subtle translateY(-8px to 0). Duration 400ms. Easing: cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1). Stagger page sections by 80ms.
animations.card_hover: scale(1.01) translateY(-2px) with elevated shadow. Spring: stiffness 300, damping 25. Duration ~250ms perceived.
animations.button_press: scale(0.98) translateY(1px) on :active. Spring: stiffness 400, damping 30. Instant response, 150ms release.
animations.section_expand: Height auto-interpolation using layout animation. Spring: stiffness 200, damping 25. Content fades in 200ms after height settles.
animations.list_stagger: Children mount with translateY(12px) + opacity(0) resolving to translateY(0) + opacity(1). Stagger: 80ms per item. Spring: stiffness 260, damping 20.
animations.toast_enter: translateY(100%) to translateY(0) + opacity 0 to 1. Spring: stiffness 300, damping 28. Auto-dismiss after 4s with opacity fade 300ms.
animations.shimmer: Linear gradient highlight translating left-to-right across skeleton surface. CSS animation 1.5s infinite linear. No JS re-renders.
animations.glass_focus: Input focus ring scales from 0.98 to 1.0 opacity with ring-2 ring-accent/20. Transition 200ms ease-out.
